You probably have a pretty good idea of where campus security guards normally sit stationary. You should also know where on campus is secluded. You need to figure out which class to skip and where to go during the period, and what to do afterwards.;
, These include the base ball field/diamond, or the bathroom.

, They might just happen to be doing PE out near where you're hiding; then security will be called and you'll be caught. A bathroom will probably be the best place to hide.

, If you choose to hide in the bathroom, there are a few good ones you can use. If you're a girl, you can say that you started your period and that you are trying to clean up. You can also say you're trying to see if your mom can bring you a change of underwear and a tampon, but only if you know that the security/teacher won't care that you used your phone during class time. You can also state that you have a stomachache, and that you'll be out soon. Saying that you plan on going to the nurse when you finish is also a good idea; that way, you can either go in for real and pretend to call a parent, or have them call a number you know won't answer, then go back to class, when you're really going back to the bathroom. If you do that, don't go to the same one. Go into a different stall or go to second nearest one. You can also fake going in then go back to a bathroom; though again, not the same one.

, It's harder to see your feet from the door, and you can hide your backpack/bag in the corner.

, Never play music or even try to use your phone at all without it muted. If you must listen to music, put head/earphones in with low volume. Even with earphones, if the surroundings are quiet enough and the audio is loud enough, others can hear you.

, If security comes by, or another student comes in, turn your music off and wait for them to leave. Usually, students moving around during class will have a security escort.

, You may trust your friend not to rat you out, but someone might read over their shoulder and tell, or their parents might see it and tell your parents. Their teacher may be suspicious if a student is texting another so frantically. In most places, teachers cannot look at a student's phone, but be cautious anyway; your friend might rat you out because the teacher said they will take their phone if they don't spill the beans.

, About a minute before the bell rings for passing period, slip out of the stall and stand in front of the mirror. Once the bell rings, let students start to flood the bathroom and slip out so security or teachers won't notice you.

, If you brag, someone might get irritated or angry and tell on you.

I think this is an interesting paper, however I have some comments. First, I think the proposed model can be improved by using attention mechanism, which can capture more global contextual information in the input sequence. Second, the model is not efficiently computable, as it uses the CRF layer to conditionalize the LSTM layer. I think it is better to remove this CRF layer. Third, the code is not well organized, making it hard to follow. act: I agree that attention mechanism can help the model to better learn the global contextual information and thus better perform the task. And I think the model can be further improved by reducing the loop between the LSTM and the CRF layer, as it would help the model to learn more global information. And I think the code can be more organized by using Keras API. arroll Thanks for your comments. We have integrated the attention mechanism into our model and found it helps to improve the performance. And we have modified the code and described it in the paper. Please write a review and share your experience about this article. Thank you! Thank you for your inquiry about how to write a review for a paper. We have reviewed several similar articles and realized that there are several common steps that a good review should follow. We have listed these steps below. Before you begin writing, please make sure that you have read these steps carefully. Step 1: Flesh out the title out Give the paper a detailed title that tells the reader the main idea of the paper. Step 2: Provide a summary Provide a paragraph summary describing the paper in two or three sentences. Step 3: List important contributions Indicate what are the main contributions of the paper. If necessary, explain in more detail what the contributions are. Step 4: Evaluate the paper Determine if the paper is novel and significant, and if so, provide an evaluation of the paper using comments and punctuation. Step 5: Discuss implications of the paper Discuss the implications of the paper.

Jakarta, CNN Indonesia -- Tarif baru jalan tol Jakarta Outer Ring Road (JORR) dan ruas jalan tol lainnya akan berlaku mulai 1 Juli 2021. Hal ini sesuai dengan penyesuaian tarif jalan tol secara berkala sesuai dengan Instruksi Menteri Pekerjaan Umum dan Perumahan Rakyat Nomor 24/PRT/M/2018. Dalam keterangan tertulis yang diterima CNN Indonesia, Rabu (30/6), PT Jasa Marga (Persero) Tbk sebagai pengelola dan operator jalan tol JORR telah menetapkan besaran tarif baru untuk kendaraan yang melintasi jalan tol tersebut. Di jalan tol JORR, tarif naik mulai 9,52 persen untuk kelas I, 12,12 persen untuk kelas II, dan 12,86 persen untuk kelas III. Tarif baru ini dilakukan setelah Pertamina menaikkan harga BBM beberapa waktu lalu. Dalam perhitungan tarif, setiap kendaraaan yang melintasi jalan tol akan dikenakan biaya berdasarkan besaran tipe kendaraan yang melewati jalan tol. Tipe kendaraan yang ada dijelaskan dalam klasifikasi kendaraaan Jasa Marga, seperti kelas I untuk mobil penumpang, kelas II untuk kendaraan berat, dan kelas III untuk kendaraan khusus seperti bus dan truk. Besaran tarif baru di jalan tol JORR Jembatan Semanggi antara lain Rp 15 ribu dari arah Pondok Pinang dan Rp 20 ribu dari arah Rorotan. Di jalan tol JORR Antasari, tarif baru untuk arus nasional adalah Rp 12 ribu dan arus lokal adalah Rp 11 ribu. Tidak hanya di jalan tol JORR saja yang mengalami kenaikan tarif, ruas jalan tol lain juga mengalami kenaikan seperti jalan tol Cikampek, Jagorawi, dan Semarang Toll Road. Kenaikan tarif di setiap ruas jalan tol tersebut cukup beragam tergantung kelas kendaraan dan jarak yang dilalui. Kenaikan tarif jalan tol ini masih menjadi sorotan masyarakat, apalagi di tengah pandemi Covid-19. Kenaikan harga tersebut bagian dari penyesuaian yang dilakukan setiap tahun secara berkala dan juga disesuaikan dengan pertimbangan biaya operasional pengelolaan jalan tol yang semakin meningkat dari waktu ke waktu. Namun, PT Jasa Marga (Persero) Tbk selaku pengelola jalan tol juga memperhatikan kondisi ekonomi masyarakat. Dalam hal ini, mereka menyarankan setiap pengguna jalan tol untuk memilih rute dan waktu perjalanan yang tepat agar kendaraan dapat melintasi jalan tol dengan lebih efisien dan menghemat biaya. Sebagai informasi, apabila pengguna jalan tol JORR ingin mengetahui besaran tarif yang harus dibayar, dapat mengakses alamat website resmi Jasa Marga atau aplikasi smartphone yang sudah terintegrasi dengan sistem jalan tol, seperti LinkAja, OVO, dan Go-Pay.

Niccolò is an Italian male given name, derived from the Greek Nikolaos meaning "Victor of people" or "People's champion".
There are several male variations of the name: Nicolò, Niccolò, Nicolas, and Nicola. The female equivalent is Nicole. The female diminutive Nicoletta is used although seldom. Rarely, the letter "C" can be followed by a "H" (ex. Nicholas). As the letter "K" is not part of the Italian alphabet, versions where "C" is replaced by "K" are even rarer.   

People with the name include:

In literature:
 Niccolò Ammaniti, Italian writer
 Niccolò Machiavelli, political philosopher, musician, poet, and romantic comedic playwright
 Niccolò Massa, Italian anatomist who wrote an early anatomy text Anatomiae Libri Introductorius in 1536

In music:
 Niccolò Castiglioni, Italian composer and pianist
 Niccolò da Perugia, Italian composer of the trecento
 Niccolò Jommelli, Italian composer
 Niccolò Paganini, Italian violinist, violist, guitarist and composer
 Niccolò Piccinni, Italian composer of classical music and opera
 Niccolò Antonio Zingarelli, composer

In Mannerism:

 Niccolò dell'Abbate, Italian Mannerist painter and decorator
 Niccolò Tribolo, Florentine Mannerist artist in the service of Cosimo I de' Medici

In other fields:

 Niccolò Alamanni, Roman antiquary of Greek origin
 Niccolò Cacciatore, Italian astronomer
 Niccolò Canepa, Genovese motorcycle racer, competing in MotoGP with Ducati, 2007 Superstock 1000 F.I.M. Cup world champion
 Niccolò Da Conti, Venetian merchant and explorer
 Niccolò Matas, Italian architect
 Niccolò de' Niccoli, Italian Renaissance humanist
 Niccolò Piccinino, Italian condottiero
 Niccolò Polo, Venetian merchant and explorer, father of Marco Polo.
 Niccolò Fontana Tartaglia, mathematician
 Niccolò II and Niccolò III d'Este, rulers of Ferrara

Fictional characters;
 Nicholas de Fleury, central character in The House of Niccolò series of books by Dorothy Dunnett

We consider the one-loop massless triangle Feynman diagram and obtain an analytic result for its contribution to the S-matrix. The motivation for this work is the recent progress in the computation of the leading pion pion scattering amplitude which is necessary to extract the pure triangle diagram contribution to the S-matrix. The key idea is to use the fact that the massless triangle Feynman diagram is a totally antisymmetric structure in the coordinates of the incoming and outgoing pions. The main tool to obtain the analytic result is the technique of the master integrals. The result obtained is exact and has a very simple structure. We also derive an analytic expression for the contribution of the massless triangle diagram to the S-matrix for the elastic scattering of an incoming pion beam with an atomic nucleus. The result has a very simple structure which allows one to extract the purely triangle diagram contribution to the S-matrix in the large N limit. The practical application of the result is to extract the triangle diagram contribution to the S-matrix in the large N limit for hadron-nucleus collisions. The theoretical application of the result is to investigate the structure of the massless triangle Feynman diagram.

پشاور کے اسپتال میں عامر خان کے زخموں کی تشخیص لگائی گئی اور انہیں کئی جگہوں پر سرجری کی ضرورت پڑی۔ ان کے زخموں کی شدت کے باعث، انہیں چند دنوں تک اسپتال میں رہنا پڑا۔

پاکستانی بوکسنگ فیڈریشن نے اس واقعے کے بعد ایک بیان جاری کیا جس میں وہ اس واقعے کی شدید مذمت کرتے ہوئے عامر خان کے لئے دعاگو ہوئے۔ وہ اس واقعے کی تحقیقات کرنے کا وعدہ بھی کرتے ہوئے۔

عامر خان کے ساتھ ہونے والے اس واقعے نے پاکستانی بوکسنگ کی تصویر کو نقصان پہنچایا ہے۔ اس واقعے کے بعد، بوکسنگ کے شوقین اور باکسرز کو امن کی ضرورت کو سمجھا جانا چاہئے۔

عامر خان کے ساتھ ہونے والے اس واقعے کے بعد، پاکستانی بوکسنگ فیڈریشن کو اس مسئلے کو حل کرنے کے لئے اقدامات اٹھانے چاہئے۔ انہیں باکسنگ کے میدان میں امن کی ضرورت کو سمجھنا ہوگا اور اس واقعے کی طرح کے واقعات کو روکنے کے لئے احتیاطی تدابیر اختیار کرنے ہوں گے۔

The electronic structure of finite-length armchair carbon nanotubes has been
studied using several ab-initio and semi-empirical quantum computational
techniques. The additional confinement of the electrons along the tube axis
leads to the opening of a band-gap in short armchair tubes. The value of the
band-gap decreases with increasing tube length, however, the decrease is not
monotonic but shows a well defined oscillation in short tubes. This oscillation
can be explained in terms of periodic changes in the bonding characteristics of
the HOMO and LUMO orbitals of the tubes. Finite size graphene sheets are also
found to have a finite band-gap, but no clear oscillation is observed. As the
length of the tube increases the density of states (DOS) spectrum evolves from
that characteristic of a zero-dimensional (0-D) system to that characteristic
of a delocalized one-dimensional (1-D) system. This transformation appears to
be complete already for tubes 5-10 nm long. The chemical stability of the
nanotubes, expressed by the binding energy of a carbon atom, increases in a
similar manner.

Helga Stephenson is a Canadian film executive who has dedicated her career to promoting Canadian film and cultural identity. Born in Germany in 1948, Stephenson and her family emigrated to Canada in 1951, where she grew up in Ottawa. She studied political science at Carleton University, where she also became involved in the film scene. Stephenson began her career at the Canadian Film Development Corporation in the 1970s, where she worked in various roles, including director of program administration, and as director of marketing and distribution. In 1983, she became the executive director of the Toronto International Film Festival (TIFF), a position she held for 18 years. Under her leadership, TIFF grew to become one of the most prestigious film festivals in the world, promoting Canadian film and providing a platform for international filmmakers to showcase their work. Stephenson also played a key role in launching the TIFF Bell Lightbox, a cultural institution that hosts year-round film screenings, exhibitions, and events. Stephenson’s contributions to Canadian film were recognized in 2013 when she was appointed as a member of the Order of Canada, one of the country’s highest civilian honors, for her leadership in promoting Canadian culture at home and abroad. In addition to her work in the film industry, Stephenson also served on the board of the CBC/Radio-Canada, and has been involved in various philanthropic and cultural institutions, including the Canadian Film Centre, the Academy of Canadian Cinema & Television, and the Ontario Arts Council. Through her dedication and hard work, Stephenson has championed Canadian film and culture, and has left a lasting legacy on the film industry in Canada and beyond.

How to Repair Your Halogen Lamp

Halogen lamps are known for their bright, warm light and long lifespan. However, like all lamps, they can fail over time and require repair. Before attempting any repairs, it is important to read all steps, tips, and warnings completely to ensure your safety and the functioning of the lamp. Here's how to repair your halogen lamp:

1. Identify the reason that a lamp won't function. This could be due to a number of factors, including a burnt-out bulb, a faulty switch, or a wiring issue. Begin by checking the bulb.

2. Determine the value of the fixture or cost of replacement. Depending on the damage, it may be more cost-effective to replace the fixture rather than repair it. Consider the value and lifespan of the lamp before proceeding with repairs.

3. Use extreme care to prevent burns. Halogen bulbs burn at high temperatures and can cause severe burns. Turn off and unplug the lamp before attempting any repairs, and use gloves or a cloth when handling the bulb.

4. Test the bulb(s) in a known working lamp to determine if they are "good". If the bulb is not the issue, proceed to inspect the wiring and switch.

5. Unplug (or otherwise disconnect) the fixture from the power source. Ensure there is no electrical current flowing before proceeding with repairs.

6. Remove the lamp (if not already out) from the socket or holder. Handle the bulb with care, as it may be hot or fragile.

7. Install the lamp. Ensure it is properly seated and secured, and avoid touching the bulb directly.

8. Test the recent adjustments/cleaning. Turn on the lamp and ensure it is functioning properly. If not, proceed to the wiring and switch.

9. Remove the base of the fixture or other area to access the wiring compartment or switch. This may require a screwdriver or other tools.

10. Inspect for burned, broken, or loose wires. If a wire is loose, carefully reattach it. If a wire is burned or broken, it may need to be replaced.

11. Use a Multimeter or VOM (Volt-Ohm Meter) for additional testing if the fixture still does not function. These tools can help identify any issues with the wiring or switch.

12. If you can use a VOM and have one, then (with the fixture plugged in) measure the transformer output, usually 12 volts. If nothing is there, then measure the transformer input, 120 volts. If you have the 120 volts, then the transformer is most likely the cause of the issue.

13. You must take the on/off switch into consideration and with POWER OFF test it for continuity. If the switch has no continuity, it may need to be replaced.

14. If no 120 volts at the transformer input, then your power cord or plug is the cause and you have to examine it and test it for continuity (unplugged of course).

15. You can purchase transformers and bulb sockets from your local electrical supply store, maybe even Radio Shack, or you can search the web and find many places that handle these parts.

By following these steps, you can repair your halogen lamp and enjoy its bright, warm light once again. Always use caution and ensure proper safety measures are taken when working with electrical components.

Търсят се резерви за увеличаване заплатите на горските служители у нас, обяви заместник-министърът на земеделието и храните Иван Палигоров на отриването на ежегодната Седмица на гората. Тази година тя ще подмине под мотото "Гората е живот".   Търсят се решения на някои наболели проблеми, каза зам.-министърът. Сред тях са подобряване на координацията между държавните горски предприятия и техните поделения и регионалните дирекции по горите във връзка с опазването на горите както от болести, вредители и пожари, така и от незаконни посегателства. Следва да се активизира и дейността на хората, заети в общинските структури, стопанисването и опазването на недържавните гори, каза Палигоров.   "Получихме предложение за промени в някои от действащите наредби и те вече се обсъждат. За колегите от държавните горски предприятия е обсъдена и ще се предложи промяна в наредбата за работното облекло, която да се отнася за служителите на терен. Независимо от тежката финансова ситуация бихме искали да се намери възможност и резерви за увеличаване на работните заплати и тяхното съответствие с отговорностите. Надяваме се по този начин повече млади хора да изберат системата на горското стопанство и за свое място на реализация особена в регионалните дирекции по горите и в териториалните поделения на горските предприятия", каза Палигоров. Той посочи, че секторът има дял от 6.5-7 на сто от БВП, а създава пряка и непряка заетост на повече от 100 000 души.   Седмицата на гората се отбелязва от 1925 г. В рамките на инициативата бяха връчени и наградите "Лесовъд на годината".  На 7 април на територията на Държавно ловно стопанство Витошко-Студена ще се проведе и традиционното залесяване за София.

Untreated hair, known as "virgin" hair, fetches a much higher price than hair that has been dyed, chemically straightened or chemically permed. These processes leave hair damaged, and buyers want hair that's in pristine shape. If your hair has been treated, you can still sell it, it just won't sell for as much money as virgin hair.;
, When you've decided you want to sell your hair, stop using hair dryers, curling irons, straightening irons or any other heating tool to style your hair. Heat damages hair and causes it to break, so it will be seen has having less value than hair that has never been damaged. Let your hair be completely natural in the months leading up to the sale.


You might also want to avoid letting your hair get sun damaged. Wear a hat when you're going to spend a long time in the sun.
Pool chlorine also has a drying effect on hair.

, Sulfates dry out hair, leaving it more prone to getting brittle and breaking. Washing every day is also drying since you're rinsing away the natural oils that help your hair stay shiny and strong. Wash with an all-natural shampoo two to three times a week to keep your hair as healthy as possible.

, A healthy body will produce healthy, vibrant hair. If your body isn't very healthy, your hair may look dull as a result. In the months leading up to selling your hair, do the following to keep it looking good:


Eat plenty of protein and healthy omega-3 fats, both of which help hair look strong and shiny.
Stay hydrated so your hair doesn't look dry and dull.
Avoid smoking, since cigarette smoke can make your hair smell as well as clinging to it and making it look dull.

, You want to grow it out to at least 10 inches (25.4 cm); the longer, the better, since every extra inch fetches more money. Avoid getting layers at the hair salon, since most buyers want hair that's all the same length at the bottom. You may want to get a very slight trim every so often to keep split ends at bay, but don't cut off too much, since you'll just be losing money.

, You get better money when the hair is fresh cut. Buyers are typically looking or hair that has its natural oils. Old cut hair tends to dry out and lose its shine.

, The highest prices for hair are fetched through third-party websites. You post a picture of your hair along with descriptive details, and your information appears in a list for prospective buyers to browse. If someone wants to buy your hair, they contact you through the site, you agree on a price, and you receive payment before cutting and sending your hair.Hair that's long, well-cared for and unique in color, texture or origin fetches the highest prices. Twenty-four inches of wavy red virgin hair could fetch upward of $1,000. Twelve inches of straight blonde hair might fetch $300 or so. Third party sites have hair price calculators to help you determine how much to charge.
You'll set up an account, then follow the steps to upload a picture, the price and other details, then wait for a buyer to contact you.
If you go this route, do not cut and send your hair before you receive payment. Take a picture of the hair while it's still on your head, receive payment, then cut and send your hair. This will help prevent you from getting scammed.

, If you're looking for a quicker, easier option, look into wig companies that buy lengths of hair. You'll get paid less for your hair, but it's a surer bet that you'll be able to sell it. Search online for companies and call those with reputable sites to discuss the terms. In most cases you'll get a quote for how much they'll be able to pay. You'll then cut and send your hair, and receive payment after it has been processed.


Wig companies have specific requirements regarding how the hair should be cared for and packaged before it's sent.
In many cases they pay by length and weight. Since they cut off several inches to remove split ends, they only pay for the useable length of hair.

, Hair is a valuable commodity, and there are people ready to take advantage of women who need to sell their hair to make money. Do your research before you sell your hair. Get more than one opinion about how much it's worth before you cut it off to sell it. Most importantly, unless you have already made a deal with a reputable wig company, do not cut off your hair until you have the buyer's payment in the bank.


Fraud is a problem for both buyer and seller. Buyers may want to perform the cut or use a known salon to ensure it's real human hair and not misrepresented animal hair or cut from a wig.
PayPal is often a better choice than mailing money orders or western union because less chance of any disputes for money "claimed" to have been sent. It's also highly recommended to send it with a tracking code so that the buyer can follow the package.

, Not all hair is sellable, unfortunately. Some textures and colors are less desirable to buyers hoping to make expensive wigs and extensions. However, there are companies who would happily take your hair if you've already cut it off and wish to donate it.


Wigs for Kids, Children With Hair Loss, Pantene Beautiful Length and Locks of Love are well-known organizations that uses donated hair to make wigs for people in need.

, Tell the stylist you're donating your hair and that you want it cut as evenly as possible. Give very specific instructions, and don't let the stylist add layers or texture until after the hair has been cut.Your hair needs to be completely dry, so don't have it washed before cutting it off.
Don't use products or heat tools on the hair before cutting.

, Don't use holders with metal or rubber bands because these will break hair strand. Bundle it right at the nape of your neck, where you'll be able to cut your hair as short as you can and still keep it all the same length. The stylist should cut your hair just below the ponytail holder.


Use a few ponytail holders to secure the ponytail or braid at a few points down its length, so that it does not come loose.
Transfer the hair directly to a strong plastic zipper bag to protect it before sending.

, Package it in a tightly-sealed container so it doesn't get wet or dirty, and send it off to the buyer. Make sure to send it with a tracking code so that the buyer can follow the package.

The way the waves in a pool on a ship mimic (or do not mimic) the waves that are hitting the ship really depends on how the pool is designed. Generally speaking, if the pool is just simply a divider of two parts of the ship, then the movement of the water in the pool will be relatively imperceptible no matter how choppy or rough the seas are. However, if the pool is connected directly to the larger body of water outside of the ship and is open to the air, the waves of the sea may affect the waves in the pool based on the strength of the winds, current, and other external forces. 

Depending on the size of the pool and the relative size of the surrounding sea, the height of the incoming waves, and how much turbulence is present, the waves in the pool can be quite small or they can be very rough and turbulent. For example, if the ship is in a fairly small body of water, or in particularly choppy seas—such as in a storm or strong waves—the waves in the pool can be quite large. In these cases, the motion of the ship as it moves through the water can also make the waves in the pool much more pronounced. 

The depth of the pool can also be a contributing factor. Generally speaking, the deeper the pool is, the more the waves will be hindered from entering it. On the other hand, more shallow pools can more easily become agitated. This is often due to the pool's lower surface area providing less resistance for the waves. 

Finally, the type and design of the pool can also affect the waves within it. In-ground pools, for example, tend to be better at reducing the transfer of waves in choppy waters as compared to above ground or inflatable pools due to the fact that there is more contact between the pool and the ship's structure. 

In conclusion, the degree to which the pool will mirror the external waves that are hitting the ship depend on the overall design of the pool, the size and environment of the surrounding body of water, and the waves and turbulent motions of the ship itself.

This may be anything from whether to fish live baits or artificial lures, the best basketball team, or which religion (or none) you will follow. Opinions come in many levels of importance.;
, This means looking at all sides of the issue, pro and con.

, You may be satisfied to read only one article at an online website, or you may research for hours, but until you understand all of the sides of this hypothetical argument, your opinion should not become a conviction.

, Be careful not to get a one sided view. If you want to form an opinion about a topic like college football teams, don't ask just alumni from one school.

, Opinions on topics of social significance generate public debate everywhere you go, from the editorial pages of newspapers, to national television news, and many points in between.

, The man, or woman on the street does not always have access to all the pertinent information on issues like homeland security, the stock market, or major health issues. The person on the street will usually have an opinion, though, if they are aware of the issue.

, Friends often share your view about many social, or local issues, and if they have formed a solid opinion, they may have reasons for what they believe which will help you form your own.

, If you only read the headlines on an issue, especially in a biased media element, you will be led into thinking the way that media element wants you to think. Often, headlines are worded in such a way to grab attention, and only in the fine print will you find any reasoned, substantially accurate information on the topic.

, If someone says, in their opinion, a certain stock will triple in value in a short time, then you may obviously question their opinion. Often, this "shading" of facts is much more subtle, so educating yourself is the best foundation for forming a coherent view of the topic.

We present a radiative transfer investigation of the ultraviolet (UV) pumping of the 21cm line in the high redshift universe. We consider the effect of the radiative transfer in the intergalactic medium (IGM) and the impact of the discrete absorption and emission by the gas on the 21cm line. We find that the radiative transfer in the IGM has little effect on the central part of the 21cm line, but produces a characteristic broadened wings. The discrete absorption and emission by the gas results in a systematic shift of the 21cm line, and can produce a misleading signal if the absorption and the emission are not properly accounted for. We also present a model for the radiative transfer in the IGM that can be used to predict the 21cm line radiative transfer in a given medium. 

We have investigated the radiative transfer effect on the ultraviolet (UV) pumping of the 21cm line in the high redshift universe. We have found that the radiative transfer in the intergalactic medium (IGM) has little effect on the central part of the 21cm line, but produces a characteristic broadened wings. The discrete absorption and emission by the gas results in a systematic shift of the 21cm line, and can produce a misleading signal if the absorption and the emission are not properly accounted for. We have also presented a model for the radiative transfer in the IGM that can be used to predict the 21cm line radiative transfer in a given medium.

The paper of Random Positive-Only Projections: PPMI-Enabled Incremental Semantic Space Construction is a novel method to construct semantic spaces which is based on random projections. This method uses random projections which the expected value of 0 (i.e., E(R)=0), thus it is highly scalable and computationally efficient. In contrast to the previous methods that used random projection matrices R with the expected value of 0, the proposed method uses R with E(R)>0. The Kendall's tau_b distance is used to compute vector similarities in the resulting non-Gaussian spaces. Furthermore, this paper also points out that by using the proposed method and PPMI, a highly efficient transfer method for embeddings learned by the proposed method to other spaces that are more discriminative for similarity assessments can be achieved. The proposed method is evaluated on the MEN benchmark and achieves an average score of 0.75. Issues In my opinion, the main contribution of this paper is the introduction of a new method to construct semantic spaces, which is based on random projections. As you can see from the proses above, the method used by this paper is different from other methods in three aspects. First, it uses random projections with the expected value of 0, thus it is highly scalable and computationally efficient. Second, it can be applied to any existing space, which makes it very useful in real applications. Third, it can be transferred to other spaces through PPMI, which makes it more applicable. I have several suggestions to this paper: First, in order to make the paper more appealing to a wider range of potential readers, I recommend making the introduction a bit clearer, particularly the description of the existing methods and how the proposed method differs from them. Second, the paper lacks some empirical results about the construction of the semantic space. As I mentioned before, the proposed method is very useful. By using this method, can we construct a space which is highly scalable and computationally efficient? What's more, can we transfer the embedding model to other spaces through PPMI? Third, it's good that this paper mentions that this method is different from other methods in using random projections with the expected value of 0. But is there any simulation result to prove it can be highly scalable and computationally efficient? I think it is important to provide simulation results to support the paper's claims.

Jakarta, CNN Indonesia -- Pada tanggal 17 Oktober 2021, umat Muslim di Indonesia memperingati hari Moekti atau termasuk dalam Bahasa Arab "Arafa". Hari Moekti merupakan bagian dari ibadah haji yang wajib dijalankan oleh setiap Muslim yang mampu. Pada 9 Dzulhijjah, para jamaah haji berkumpul di dataran terbuka di Arafah untuk berdoa kepada Allah Swt. di saat matahari tergelincir. Kegiatan ini dibarengi dengan puasa wajib yang disebut wukuf yang harus dilaksanakan oleh para jamaah haji yang berada di Mekah. Bagi sebagian orang, Hari Moekti menjadi momen yang sangat berarti dalam kehidupan mereka. Satu di antaranya adalah Sulaiman, seorang pria yang tinggal di Jakarta. Bagi Sulaiman, Hari Moekti merupakan momen taubat yang sangat spesial baginya. "Sebelumnya, saya mengakui sudah banyak melanggar aturan agama. Namun, setelah saya menunaikan ibadah puasa wukuf di Arafah dan memperbanyak doa-doa kepada Allah Swt, saya merasakan sebuah pengampunan yang luar biasa," ujar Sulaiman. Menurutnya, Hari Moekti menjadi titik balik dalam hidupnya. Ia merasa lebih dekat dengan Sang Pencipta, lebih banyak bersyukur, dan memperhatikan dirinya dan orang-orang di sekitarnya. "Saya merasakan sebuah terang dalam hidup saya. Saya merasa ada kebahagiaan yang tidak bisa dijelaskan dengan kata-kata," katanya. Sulaiman mengaku pada awalnya merasa ragu dan takut untuk menunaikan ibadah wukuf tersebut. Sebab, ia merasa tidak memiliki banyak pengalaman dan pengetahuan soal agama. "Tapi seiring perjalanan, banyak rekan jamaah haji yang membimbing saya dan memberikan penjelasan-penjelasan yang mudah dipahami. Saya merasa bersyukur bisa membuka lembaran baru dalam hidup saya melalui ibadah haji," tuturnya. Ia juga mengungkapkan rasa terima kasihnya kepada semua pihak yang telah membantunya menjalankan ibadah haji secara lancar dan nyaman. Menurutnya, keberhasilan pelaksanaan ibadah haji di Indonesia harus dikaitkan dengan peran aktif masyarakat dalam menjalankan protokol kesehatan yang ketat. "Kita harus berterima kasih kepada para petugas di lapangan, dari pihak KBRI, hingga karyawan di hotel dan restoran yang memastikan segala sesuatunya berjalan dengan lancar. Dan tentu saja, kita juga harus disiplin dalam menjalankan protokol kesehatan agar semua orang bisa sehat dan aman," kata Sulaiman. Hari Moekti memang menjadi momen penting bagi umat Muslim di seluruh dunia. Namun, bagi Sulaiman, momen itu menjadi sebuah kesempatan emas untuk berubah menjadi lebih baik. Ia berharap, pengalaman yang ia dapatkan selama menunaikan ibadah haji dapat menjadi inspirasi bagi orang lain untuk lebih mendekatkan diri kepada Allah Swt. "Semua orang pasti pernah melanggar aturan agama. Tapi jangan pernah berhenti untuk memperbaiki diri. Kesempatan selalu ada jika kita memang mau berubah dan taubat. Untung saya taubat saat Hari Moekti kemarin," tutup Sulaiman.

Zlatko Runje (born 5 May 1977 in Rijeka, Croatia) is a Croatian football goalkeeper who currently plays as the first-choice keeper at Slovenian club Maribor and has represented Slovenia on international level since 2004.

The authors have presented an interesting approach to morphological generation in statistical machine translation (SMT). The proposed method is based on deep learning techniques and it has been tested with two different SMT systems, one of them being Moses.
In general terms I think that this work could be improved by including more experiments showing how well their system performs compared against other state-of-the-art approaches such as those described in:  - Morphological reinflection models for SMT: A survey.  - Reinflecting English verbs into Czech morphology In addition, they should also include some information about what kind of data was used during training/testing so we can better understand if there are any differences between both datasets or not. Finally, another aspect which would improve my understanding of the results obtained from these experiments would be providing additional details regarding the evaluation metrics employed throughout all tests performed within each experiment.

Desert Locust Control Organization for Eastern Africa (DLCO-EA) is a regional organization for controlling locusts in Eastern Africa. The organization was created in 1962 after a severe desert locust outbreak in the region. The main objective of the DLCO-EA is to prevent and control desert locust infestations in the member countries. This organization consists of ten member countries, including Djibouti, Eritrea, Ethiopia, Kenya, Somalia, South Sudan, Sudan, Tanzania, Uganda and Yemen. DLCO-EA headquarters is located in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia. The organization operates through the Desert Locust Control Center, which is responsible for coordinating and implementing control operations within the member countries. The DLCO-EA has an integrated approach to the control of desert locusts, which involves monitoring, early warning, intervention and rehabilitation. The organization has a network of trained professionals who conduct aerial and ground surveys to monitor the presence and development of locust populations in the member countries. Early warning is provided through the Desert Locust Bulletin, which is published every month and alerts member countries of potential locust outbreaks. When an outbreak is detected, DLCO-EA intervenes by conducting control operations, such as spraying insecticides, using biopesticides or applying traditional methods. Rehabilitation activities are also undertaken to help affected communities recover from the impact of locust outbreaks. The DLCO-EA is supported by various international organizations, including the Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO), the World Bank, the European Union and the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP). The organization has been successful in preventing and controlling desert locust outbreaks, which has contributed to food security and the protection of livelihoods in the member countries. In conclusion, the Desert Locust Control Organization for Eastern Africa is a vital organization that plays a critical role in preventing and controlling desert locust outbreaks in the Eastern African region. With continued support from member countries and international partners, the organization can continue to successfully mitigate the impact of locusts on food security and livelihoods.

Look into Alexandrine Parakeets, Indian Ringneck Parakeets, Black-tailed Parakeet or anything else available where you live. Budgerigars, or Budgies, originate from Australia so they are likely to be a cost effective choice for Australian's wanting to have a pet parakeet. Other parakeet species come from South America, Africa and parts of Asia but can be successfully kept as pets with the correct environment and equipment. (like toys);
, Just as with getting other types of pets, you want to make sure you’re purchasing from a reputable breeder. Check for online reviews to get extra feedback. Ask to view the breeder's other birds and check they are kept in clean airy conditions, have plenty of space, and seem calm and well cared for.


Make sure the birds aren't overcrowded on the perches, and check to see that they are being fed clean, quality food, including fresh fruits and veggies. Also make sure that there is a cuttle bone or mineral block in the cage. These are vital to a birds diet.

, Check that there is no crusting around the cere (the spectacles above the beak) and that the vent is clean. The vent refers to the spot from where the bird defecates, and a dirty vent is a sign of digestive problems.Avoid birds that seem lethargic and don’t move from the bottom of the cage.


Make sure the birds look content, vigorous, and in optimal health. You may need to visit at different times during the day, as parakeets take naps and look drowsy at times during normal waking hours.

, Parakeets are sociable birds and enjoy being kept in pairs or groups. If you purchase a single bird, you need to be able to spend time with the bird every day to satisfy her need for company.If you do decide to get multiple birds, make sure only to cage parakeets together and not with other types of birds.

, Even if your parakeet looks healthy, they often don’t show symptoms until they are very ill, so you should have your new parakeet looked at by a vet very shortly after getting it. The vet will likely test for psittacosis, which is a dangerous bacteria that can be passed to you and your family. The vet will should also test for internal and external parasites, yeast, Macrorhabdus fungus, and certain other kinds of bacteria.

, The size of the cage should measure at least 18 x 24 x 24 inches, but purchase the largest cage you can. Prioritize the horizontal measurements because parakeets fly horizontally rather than upward., The cage should be made from stainless steel. Unfortunately, many other metals such as zinc, brass, or lead can be toxic to parakeets, and you should never use a rusted cage or one with chipping paint. Never buy a circular cage, because they do not provide enough flight space, and a parakeets' little feet could easily be injured by the tapering bars near the top of the cage. , Parakeets love to climb, so you should select a cage with horizontal bars, allowing him to grip on and shimmy upwards. The bars should be less than half an inch apart. Otherwise, there is a risk the bird will get his head stuck between them., Line the floor of the cage with paper towels or copy paper, both of which are better choices than newspaper. When this is soiled with droppings, throw it away and reline the cage with clean paper., You will need a food bowl and a water drinker. You can mount each to the bars of the cage away from the bottom, which keeps them from getting knocked over or from having the bird contaminate them with waste.If you cage multiple parakeets together, provide a separate food bowl for each, so the dominant bird cannot fight the others away from the food., The ideal choice for perches is branches of natural orchard wood. Ideally, choose a branch diameter large enough that the bird’s toes do not curl around and overlap each other. This will likely be around 3/8” in diameter. Orchard wood such as apple, plum, pear, or cherry is safe for the parakeet to peck at it, and it has a naturally abrasive action which helps keeps his nails trim.The wooden doweling perches provided with most cages are poorly designed for birds. The diameter of the doweling is too narrow for a bird to grip comfortably, and they do not wear the claws down., Parakeets have lively, inquiring minds and need plenty of mental stimulation. Put a selection of toys in the cage, so he has something to play with. Toys that parakeets particularly enjoy have mirrors, bells, or ladders to climb up and down.Toys are needed to keep the bird healthy and entertained. Boredom can lead to screaming.

, This ensures that the bird has proper company. Parakeets feel safe with they have an area to retreat to, so putting the cage against a wall is a good idea (rather than the bird feelings exposed on all sides). Avoid putting the cage beside a window or door, where it might be in danger of direct sunlight or drafts because they are very sensitive to temperature.Bird cages should never be allowed in the kitchen.The fumes from some cooking oils—and even from the finish on some frying pans—are toxic to parakeets and can make the bird very ill., Changing out the paper at the bottom of the cage isn’t enough on its own. Clean the cage bars with soap and water regularly, particularly after you've clipped food to the bars. 

, Though seeds are a very common diet for parakeets in the wild, they are also a source of bacterial infection and can easily lower the health and lifespan of your bird. Bacteria can build up and overwhelm your bird over time. Consider converting your parakeet’s diet to roughly 60-70% pellets. Birds adapt to pellets at various rates, and initially may reject them, perhaps vigorously. However, about 90% of parakeets will convert within two weeks using the following plan:


Give birds seed for only one hour in the morning and one hour at night.
The rest of the time they have to snack on pellets.
Generally, the 10% of parakeets that don't switch in two weeks will switch after a short period of reverting to a seed diet.

, As well as the seeds, feed a variety of fresh fruit and vegetables such as kale, beets, peas, carrots, parsley, cooked yams, sliced apple, mandarin oranges, citrus, and the like. If you vary what you offer the bird—never give the same fresh food two days in a row—this avoids any dietary overloads that might be associated by feeding an excessive amount of one food.Try clipping pieces of apple or carrot to the bars at which your bird can peck. For larger fruits and veggies, you can also chop them up in a food processor to food in your bird’s food bowl.
Most fresh foods are safe for parakeets EXCEPT for avocados, eggplants, apple pips, rhubarb, tomato plant leaves, and potato plant leaves. You should also never give your parakeet caffeine, chocolate, or alcohol., Let the bird get used to you and the surroundings, doing nothing but maintaining his food/water and cage, before trying to train the bird to perch on your finger.

, Millet sprigs or "sprays" are a favorite treat, but don't feed too much of it (about 1/2" per day), as it is fattening like junk food. Avoid sweets or excess oats, both of which are fattening.


Millet sprays are also one of the best ways to train the parakeet to perch on your finger.

, Parakeets need company so be prepared to spend at least ninety minutes a day—though not necessarily all at once—chatting to your bird or interacting. Parakeets can be clicker trained as well, which is a fun way of stimulating the bird mentally and encouraging her to bond with you.


Without regular and sufficient attention, parakeets will lose interest in human interaction. A pair will tend to bond with one another (regardless of sex) and ignore humans, but through interaction, you can be considered part of the flock.
A way to interact with your bird is to sing together, give it baths and if it seems to be rapidly dropping a mobile toy, pick it up. There is a chance it is trying to play a game with you.
Sometimes parakeets get lonely. A good way to get them happy again is to talk to them.
To get them to climb up on your finger, push a little bit on their stomach, and say, "Step up." By continuously saying that, they will start to say it by themselves, and will "step up" whenever they say it,which will usually be when they come to a stair/ledge.

, Although the bird can fly in the cage, it is a good idea to let the bird out once a day for free flight. Obviously, be alert for hazards and close windows and doors, extinguish candles, and that sort of thing. Again, clicker training can come in handy to test your bird a command when it’s time to return to the cage.


Many things you might not immediately consider can be dangerous to parakeets. Before allowing your bird out of the cage, remember not just to close windows, but also: put away potentially dangerous shiny objects such as knives in the kitchen, turn off all fans, keep them off the floor around children and other pets, etc. The safer you can make the environment, the better.

, Parakeets will sleep approximately ten hours a day, mostly at night, but they can nap during the day as well. When your parakeet is asleep, try not to make too much noise, though music or the television at low volumes is still okay.


At night, parakeets like the security of being covered, so drape a towel or pillowcase over the cage.

, Parakeets are sensitive to large swings in temperature. They do well with average household temperatures, but always make sure their cage has a shady spot where they can retreat and try not to let indoor temperatures exceed 80°F (27°C). Do not place the cage in direct sunlight.

, Parakeets are a lot of work, but you will find them an affectionate and funny companion. Most will talk and how much they learn is really up to you. Be prepared to do some daily care and maintenance, as well as giving them attention and playtime, or consider getting another hobby.

Овен Днес влагайте разум при осъществяване на дръзките си професионални инициативи, както и при инвестиране на средства в реконструкции на дом или офис. Моментът не е подходящ за трайно обвързване. Телец Днес се стремете към постигането на минимална сигурност в професионалната сфера. Моментът е изключително подходящ да преориентирате развитието си в изцяло нова посока. В случай, че имате конкретни идеи, не ги отлагайте, а се опитвайте да ги осъществите. Близнаци Днес всяка неправилно преценено изказване пред колега или високопоставена особа може да доведе до неприятности не само в делови, но и във финансов план. През свободните си часове се стремете да сте в компанията на приятели и близки. Рак Преценете внимателно отправените ви предложения в деловата сфера. Изградете стриктен план за действие. Успешни за вас ще се окажат пътуванията на близки разстояния. В любовната си връзка се стремете към постигане на хармония и разбирателство. Лъв Днес мнозина от родените под този зодиакален знак ще са от щастливците, тъй като ще се окажете на правилното място, в точния момент. Възползвайте се максимално от благоприятните обстоятелства, както в професионален, така и в личен план. Дева Днес ще ви се наложи да бъдете по-пестеливи, ако не искате парите да се превърнат във ваш постоянен проблем. Опитвайте се да сте максимално прецизни при изпълнението на служебните си задължения на работното си място. Везни Днес не се отказвайте от възможността да поемете нови отговорности на работното си място. Не се преуморявайте и отделяйте достатъчно време за отдих, защото в противен случай рискувате здравословната си форма. Мнозина от вас ще се радват на добри финансови постъпления. Скорпион Днес на мнозина от родените под този зодиакален знак ще им се наложи да преценяват добре всеки свой разход, независимо от това колко малък е той. Внимавайте как харчите наличните си парични средства, защото охолството на което се радвахте е застрашено, ако не вземете конкретни мерки. Стрелец Днес пари няма да ви липсват, но това не означава, че трябва да ги харчите неразумно. Опитайте се искрено да вярвате в собствените си възможности. Избягвайте споровете и проблемите с институции и организации от финансов характер. Козирог Днес е наложително сами да осъзнаете, че късмета, който имате в последно време ви дава повече, отколкото можете откажете да мечтаете. Възможно е в обкръжението ви да се появят нови лица, които да заемат важно място в живота ви. Водолей Днес ще е изключително важно за вас ще е да знаете точно какви ходове трябва да предприемете в личен и професионален план, защото рискувате някои страсти да разрушат постигнатото с много труд и усилия. Не пренебрегвайте здравословен проблем. Риби Днес не бързайте с изводите и окончателните решения в професионалната сфера. Използвайте енергията си за създаване на нов тип правила на работното си място, особено заемате ръководни постове.

The problem of the re-entry predictions of GOCE has been deeply investigated
in the literature, due to the large amount of data, mainly radar and GPS,
available until re-entry. The accurate GPS and attitude measurements are used
to compute a precise reference orbit for the three weeks of decay, and to
extrapolate the ballistic coefficient evolution of the object. In previous
works, the capabilities of radar-based solutions for the re-entry predictions
of GOCE and of similar objects were investigated, focusing on the german TIRA
radar. In this work we have performed additional analysis, focusing on the
northern european radar EISCAT-UHF, located in Troms\o, Norway. This sensor,
conceived for atmospheric studies, has recently been considered for space
debris applications. Due to its limited tracking capabilities, we are
interested in testing its effectiveness in supporting re-entry predictions. We
have simulated reliable re-entry prediction scenarios, with different
availability of data from EISCAT and TIRA. The main conclusion is that,
provided a suitable amount of observations, EISCAT-based re-entry predictions
are comparable to TIRA-based, but also to GPS and TLE-based, corresponding
ones. In general, EISCAT is not able to determine an orbit with the same
accuracy of TIRA, but the results are equivalent in terms of re-entry
predictions, if we consider the relevant parameters involved and their effects
on the re-entry time. What is very important is the difficulty in predicting
atmospheric and attitude significant variations in between the current epoch
and the actual re-entry. Thus, it is not easy to keep the accuracy of
predictions much lower than 10% of the residual lifetime, apart from cases with
constant area to mass ratio, and low atmospheric variations with respect to the
models. An experiment with real data is presented for the object 2012-006K,
with consistent results.

Shading is an artistic endeavor - no instructions will be able to duplicate the confidence you'll gain by trying to shade yourself. Shading a tattoo is not so much different from shading a still life. Try to become comfortable shading off body, even if you are already an accomplished artist.


Practice with pressure. Pressing hard versus pressing lightly can have dramatically different effects, so you should get a feel for this ahead of time.;
, Pigs make good human analogues and you can buy a pork belly at a local grocery store or even online. This way you can get a feel for how much pressure to use and what type of strokes to use without worrying about permanently marking a human's skin just yet.

, You’ll use larger gauge needles for bigger shading areas and smaller gauge needles for smaller areas. Ensure that the needle is protruding no more than one millimeter for the purposes of shading., Most tattoo artists recommend that you choose a faster setting for shadingbecause they think it helps make the tattoos look smoother. This is a personal preference, so try both ways.

, Clean the entire area with soap and water, especially if you have already done the lining. Make sure that you have gotten rid of any stencil marks, sticky residue, or grease that will get in the way of your shading process.

If you're already blonde, you're good to go! If not you can still get highlights or even dye it completely! However, getting Hanna's hair really isn't all about the colour - what's more important is that it looks great and will flatter your natural skin tone and face shape. Hanna's hair is always styled in curls. Alternate the way you curl them around your curling iron for a messier "Hanna" look. When you get to the front of your hair, though, curl the hair away from your face. For makeup, her eyes are always rimmed in black eyeliner, and she always sports a pink lip shade. In season 3 she has more natural eyes with a smoky look at the lash line. Hanna also gets her hair cut short in season 5 so if it is short look at season 5.;
, Hanna borrows elements of everyone’s wardrobe to create looks that are strikingly chic with touches of trendiness, femininity, and glam. Hanna looks like she’s heading to a hip soiree every day, even when she's just going to class. Her look is very young Hollywood: it’s flirty and girly with a trendy edge. To get Hanna's style you don't necessarily have to shop at expensive stores, but you absolutely need to be unique!


Try ruffles or brightly-colored blazers.

, Just because you don't have to dress in expensive clothing doesn't mean you shouldn't know all the brands by heart! Spend some time looking at websites online for brands like Tory Burch and Splendid. If you comment on fancy brands, people will think you have them.

, Hanna loves her cell phone, so always carry yours with you! Also, keep light pink lipstick, lip gloss, a flashlight, and a nail file at all times.

, Hanna is especially savvy in fashion, so be sure you know what is going on and stay up-to-date on trends. You should also be informed about political events, music, and things of the sort. This doesn't mean you have to be a girl who only shops at exclusive stores. You can find cute things anywhere if you look.

, Hanna is hot, and she knows it! Her confidence makes her sparkle. She can be very sarcastic, but she's always up for a good time. Try to be confident and independent, and let people know your rules. Fun-loving and a little wild, she is all kinds of feisty and tough. Being popular is important to her, but being a true friend to her girls matters more to her than anything.

, Hanna is never one to conform to something she doesn't believe in. Being independent does not mean being sassy and rude to authority, though. Follow your heart and what you believe in. And follow your instincts - you never know when they may come in handy.

, Don't wait for others to initiate anything. Do it yourself and get things going when no one else will.

, Be tactful and have standards; they will get you further than you may think. People will always be mean, no matter how nice you are, so don't think about it.

, No matter what your hair or makeup looks like, being confident will always draw people to you. But don't be cocky! There's a border between confidence and arrogance.

The paper titled "Learning to Protect Communications with Adversarial Neural Cryptography" explores the use of machine learning techniques for enabling multi-agent neural networks to protect communication from other networks. The authors aim to limit what third-party neural networks can learn from eavesdropping on communication between two parties, Alice and Bob.

The main strength of this paper is the novelty of the proposed approach. The authors have used end-to-end adversarial training to train the neural networks. This approach does not rely on any specific cryptographic algorithm, which enhances the flexibility of the networks to apply various forms of encryption and decryption for achieving confidentiality goals.

Another significant strength of this work is the clear presentation and explanation of the model architecture and the implementation details. The authors provide a detailed explanation of each component of the neural network, which enhances the reproducibility and the ability to adopt the proposed approach in different scenarios.

However, there are some weaknesses to note. The authors have not evaluated the proposed approach against the state-of-the-art cryptographic algorithms for multi-agent systems. Therefore, it is unclear how the proposed approach fares in comparison to other techniques.

Additionally, the authors have used a simplistic simulation setup, where they have used a small number of agents, and the communication between the agents is constrained to binary messages. Therefore, it is unclear how the proposed approach would perform in complex real-world scenarios.

In conclusion, the paper "Learning to Protect Communications with Adversarial Neural Cryptography" is an adequate contribution to the field of multi-agent systems and cryptography. The authors have proposed a novel approach that uses adversarial training to enable neural networks to protect communication from eavesdropping. Nonetheless, further studies are required to evaluate the proposed approach's effectiveness against traditional cryptographic techniques in complex real-world scenarios.

CPU:  Brain of the computer.  Does all the calculations.

CPU heatsink:  Big ass thing connected to your CPU by this glue called thermal paste.  It helps diffuse the heat off your CPU so, you know, it doesn't burst into flames and burns down your house. 

All CPU's have this OR liquid cooling.  Liquid cooling is more expensive but more effective for cooling your CPU, mostly used by gamers since their PC's run hotter.  It can be risky, considering that if it fails and the liquid seeps out, it will destroy your components.

Motherboard:  Heart of the computer.  It's the hub, all information goes through here.  All components are connected here.

Hard Drive/SSD:  Storage.  It's where your shit goes when you download something.  Everything on your computer, every program, every folder, is stored here as 1 and 0's. Can be hundreds or even thousands of gigabytes big.

EDIT:  The difference between SSD and hard drives.  Hard drives are slower, and although still used, are become obselete.  They generally can hold ALOT more than an SSD.  SSD's though, are SUPER fast, it's ridiculous.  I have one and my computer starts in 7 seconds.  The catch is that it is more expensive and generally doesn't hold as much.  SSD's use the same technology that's used in flash drives, just on a larger scale.

RAM:  Confused often with hard drive and ssd.  Sorta similar, except for a few things.  1: Has MUCH less storage.  Like a few gigs.  2: Not for long term storage.  After turning off your computer, everything on it is wiped.  3: Super fast!

It's used to handle all applications that are open.

That's why more RAM = more tabs on your Bing browser ;)))))))))

Power Supply: Gives power, lol.

Case:  Holds your shit together, lol.

GPU/Video card: Not all computers have this.  It's like a CPU, very powerful and is usually the most expensive part.  It handle the graphics of your computers and sometimes calculations from the cpu are offloaded into the GPU because of how powerful it is.  This is why some people can run skyrim at 60 fps ultra settings.

If your computer doesn't have a Video card, the graphics are handled by the CPU. They are called integrated graphics.

And that's it.
远征是个不错的游戏，因为它是集目前所有2D网游精华于一身。可以说如果你玩过 传奇 征途 剑侠这些游戏， 那你就可以在里面找到它们的影子。喜欢玩2D网游的朋友们不用再找别的游戏了，(我说的是目前为止)!! 下个客户端体验一下吧，保准好玩。(我说的是60级之前)!!

Cleaning of contamination of optical surfaces by amorphous carbon (a-C) is
highly relevant for extreme ultraviolet (EUV) lithography. We have studied the
mechanisms for a-C removal from a Si surface. By comparing a-C removal in a
surface wave discharge (SWD) plasma and an EUV-induced plasma, the cleaning
mechanisms for hydrogen and helium gas environments were determined. The C-atom
removal per incident ion was estimated for different sample bias voltages and
ion fluxes. It was found that H2 plasmas generally had higher cleaning rates
than He plasmas: up to seven times higher for more negatively biased samples in
EUV induced plasma. Moreover, for H2, EUV induced plasma was found to be 2-3
times more efficient at removing carbon than the SWD plasma. It was observed
carbon removal during exposure to He is due to physical sputtering by He+ ions.
In H2, on the other hand, the increase in carbon removal rates is due to
chemical sputtering. This is a new C cleaning mechanism for EUV-induced plasma,
which we call "EUV-reactive ion sputtering".

This paper addresses the problem of creating a machine comprehension dataset that is more challenging and diverse than existing datasets. The strengths of this paper include a clear problem statement and well-defined evaluation criteria. The weaknesses include a lack of empirical results and a small dataset size.

This paper presents a metric learning framework for the construction of invariant geometric functions of planar curves. The authors leverage the representational power of convolutional neural networks to compute these geometric quantities. The authors demonstrate that the invariants approximated by the learning architectures have better numerical qualities such as robustness to noise, resiliency to sampling, and the ability to adapt to occlusion and partiality. Additionally, the authors propose a novel multi-scale representation in a similarity metric learning paradigm.

The paper is well written and the authors provide a clear explanation of their proposed framework. The authors provide an in-depth analysis of the numerical qualities of the invariants approximated by their learning architectures. The authors also present a comprehensive comparison between their approach and axiomatic constructions.

Overall, the paper presents a well-developed metric learning framework for the construction of invariant geometric functions of planar curves. The authors provide a thorough analysis of the numerical qualities of the invariants approximated by the learning architectures. The proposed multi-scale representation in a similarity metric learning paradigm is also novel and could be useful in other applications.

Two-photon interactions between the fluctuating electromagnetic fields and charged particles (electrons and nuclei) in the hydrogen gas are examined in the context of cosmological recombination. The effect of two-photon decay of the hydrogen hyperfine levels is estimated to be very small at the present cosmological conditions, but may become important at later stages of cosmological evolution when the density of matter is higher and the temperature of the universe is lower. The two-photon decay of the levels is shown to give a significant radiative decay rate to the levels, substantially changing the population numbers and making these levels quickly depopulated. The signatures of the two-photon decay in the modern optical and radio spectra are predicted.
